enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs from his Boulder apartment on February 25, 2016, recounting a low-key morning: he's recovering from illness on antibiotics, has a dermatologist follow-up pending, accidentally cooked rice instead of oatmeal while high the day before and is now working through the rice, and plans to spend the day outlining his five-year plan for success and relaunching his daily YouTube videos.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: uses it routinely and casually, notes it caused a cooking mistake but is unbothered
pragmatic — eats whatever is available (rice and canned vegetables with soy sauce) rather than preferred oatmeal
wants to restart them and use a five-year plan video as an introductory anchor
got burnt out on the History of America series but intends to return to listening
